course.title: Learn English with Minecraft Hardcore #12 - Quest for the Anvil! — Reading
course.description: Read and practice vocabulary from "Learn English with Minecraft Hardcore #12 - Quest for the Anvil!" — 5 reading segments with mixed quizzes.
course.source_label: Based on Learn English with Minecraft — Ep. 10

lesson.title: Learn English with Minecraft Hardcore #12 - Quest for the Anvil! — Reading Practice
lesson.passage_md:
I needed an **anvil** to repair my enchanted tools and combine enchantments. Making one requires three iron blocks and four iron **ingots** — that's a lot of iron to mine!

I went deep **underground** to find enough iron ore. The caves were dark and full of hostile mobs. I had to fight off several **skeletons** while mining.

After collecting over thirty iron ore, I returned to my base to **smelt** them all in the furnace. While waiting, I organized my chests and stored my **valuable** items safely.

With enough iron ingots ready, I crafted the anvil on my crafting table. It appeared as a heavy gray block that makes a satisfying **metallic** sound when you use it. I was so **excited** to finally have one!

I immediately used the anvil to **repair** my diamond pickaxe and combine two sharpness books onto my sword. The anvil is one of the most useful blocks for **maintaining** your best gear.
lesson.transcript_zh:
我需要一个铁砧来修复附魔工具和合并附魔。制作一个需要三个铁块和四个铁锭——需要挖很多铁矿！

我去了很深的地下寻找足够的铁矿石。洞穴又暗又充满敌对生物。我在挖矿时不得不击退了几只骷髅。

收集了三十多个铁矿石后，我回到基地把它们全部放进熔炉冶炼。在等待的同时，我整理了箱子并安全存放了贵重物品。

有了足够的铁锭，我在工作台上制作了铁砧。它是一个沉重的灰色方块，使用时会发出令人满意的金属声。我终于有了一个，太兴奋了！

我立即用铁砧修复了钻石镐，并把两本锋利附魔书合并到了剑上。铁砧是维护最佳装备最有用的方块之一。

question.prompt: How much iron is needed to craft an anvil?

options: Three iron blocks and four iron ingots
